name: Plooto
tagline: AI-powered accounts payable and receivable automation
description: Plooto automates accounts payable and receivable with AI-driven invoice processing, payment approvals, and cash flow management. It syncs with QuickBooks and Xero to streamline payment workflows, automatically match invoices, and provide real-time cash flow visibility for small and mid-sized businesses.
cons: Limited advanced AP features vs enterprise tools
